calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2021 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Ema Bell's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Set For Trial On Aug-02-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
